name: Pork Loin in Green Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 green chiles - roasted, peeled and seeded
1 cup broth from meat, salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the pork with cold water in a large pot.
2. Add the chopped onion, bay leaf, marjoram, thyme, and 1 teaspoon of salt.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 1.5 hours until the pork is tender.
4. Remove the pork from the pot and set aside.
5. In a blender or food processor, puree the remaining onion, garlic, tomatillos, tomato, green chiles, and cilantro.
6. Heat the cooking oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
7. Gradually add the puréed mixture to the skillet, stirring constantly.
8. Add the chopped onion, salt, and pepper to taste.
9. Slice the pork into thin strips and stir into the sauce.
10. Simmer for an additional 30 minutes until the flavors meld together.
11. Serve hot with rice or boiled potatoes.
